description: Use this API to return the interchange between two zones. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = znitoj(iar, jar)

error_codes.description: Zone number <= 0 or > largest allowable zone number; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
No in-service branches between zones; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Zone not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
